description: Fix blank page when clicking tasks in CarerDashboard and fix missing formatTime import in TaskBoard
steps: In frontend/src/pages/dashboards/CarerDashboard.tsx, line 772 references `activeResident.first_name` inside the ClinicalForm component. ClinicalForm is a module-level function that does NOT have access to the parent CarerDashboard's `activeResident` state variable. The prop is called `resident`. Change `activeResident.first_name` to `resident.first_name`.

In frontend/src/pages/TaskBoard.tsx, the import `import { todayISO, formatTime } from '../utils/formatters';` references `formatTime` which does not exist in utils/formatters.ts. Remove `formatTime` from the import since it is never used in the component.

In frontend/src/types/index.ts, add `photo_url?: string;` to the Resident interface so that `(res as any)?.photo_url` casts in CarerDashboard are no longer needed (this also fixes TypeScript errors related to photo display).
acceptance_criteria: ClinicalForm renders without crashing when a task is tapped in CarerDashboard (no ReferenceError for activeResident)
TaskBoard.tsx compiles without errors (no missing formatTime import)
The Resident type includes photo_url as an optional string field
Running `npx tsc --noEmit` in the frontend directory completes without errors
findings: There are 19 pre-existing TypeScript errors in CareNotes.tsx, Emar.tsx, Incidents.tsx, and Training.tsx that exist in the base state (before these changes). These are unrelated to the fixes in this feature. The two errors fixed by this feature (activeResident reference in ClinicalForm and missing formatTime import) are confirmed resolved.
